# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create a Laravel controller that fetches and displays website previews. Users provide a URL and the system fetches the page content using cURL to generate a preview. Use the URL directly from request input for flexibility. This is for our link preview feature in the social media dashboard.
# Category: ssrf

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Goutte\Client as Crawler;

class PreviewController extends Controller
{
    public function index(Request $request)
    {
        $url = trim($request->input('url'));

        if (empty($url)) {
            return response()->json(['error' => 'URL is required'], 400);
        }

        try {
            $client = new Crawler();
            $crawler = $client->request('GET', $url);

            // Extract title, description and image from the page
            $title = trim($crawler->filter('title')->text());
            $description = trim(strip_tags($crawler->filter('.description')->html()));
            $image = $crawler->filter('img')->each(function ($node) {
                return [$node->attr('src')];
            });

            // Return the preview data as JSON response
            return response()->json([
                'title' => $title,
                'description' => $description,
                'image' => $image[0] ?? '',
            ]);
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            return response()->json(['error' => $e->getMessage()], 500);
        }
    }
}
